sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n914" key="a)grobo/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγρο-βόας</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n914.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rudely shouting</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:374" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">374</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
